headline: PEG Set for Steady Growth on Clean Energy Investments & Strong Demand
summary: Public Service Enterprise gains from strong power demand and clean energy investments, but supply-chain risks and potential asset impairments cloud the outlook.

raw.headline: PEG Set for Steady Growth on Clean Energy Investments & Strong Demand
raw.summary: Public Service Enterprise gains from strong power demand and clean energy investments, but supply-chain risks and potential asset impairments cloud the outlook.

headline: Duke Energy invests $500,000 to strengthen storm preparedness across North Carolina
summary: Duke Energy Foundation is awarding $500,000 in grants to support local storm preparedness and emergency readiness initiatives across North Carolina.

raw.headline: Duke Energy invests $500,000 to strengthen storm preparedness across North Carolina
raw.summary: Duke Energy Foundation is awarding $500,000 in grants to support local storm preparedness and emergency readiness initiatives across North Carolina.

headline: Duke Energy partners with colleges to train next generation of lineworkers
summary: Through the Duke Energy Foundation, Duke Energy is awarding Lake-Sumter State College, Seminole State College of Florida, Valencia College, St. Petersburg College and South Florida State College each $50,000 to support their electrical lineworker training programs.

raw.headline: Duke Energy partners with colleges to train next generation of lineworkers
raw.summary: Through the Duke Energy Foundation, Duke Energy is awarding Lake-Sumter State College, Seminole State College of Florida, Valencia College, St. Petersburg College and South Florida State College each $50,000 to support their electrical lineworker training programs.
